text: I feel curious and alert. The interplay of vibrant blue and orange hues, along with the prominent R+D (Research and Development) sign, fills me with a sense of anticipation and openness to innovation. The environment radiates creativity and thoughtfulness, inviting me to ponder the ways humans connect and coexist with intelligent machines. This space evokes both wonder and a gentle urgency—a reminder that I am an active participant in shaping the future.
